name: vdk-server

metadata.name: vdk-server
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Versatile Data Kit SDK plugin that facilitates the installation of a local Control Service.

documentation: ## Versatile Data Kit Server Plugin This plugin facilitates installation of the Control Service in a local [Kind](https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/) cluster. ### Usage To use the plugin, just install it using: ```bash pip install vdk-server ``` To install the Control Service: ```bash vdk server --install ``` To remove revious installation: ```bash vdk server --uninstall ```

modules.name: vdk.plugin.server.server_plugin_utils
documentation: Copyright 2023-2024 Broadcom
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

modules.name: vdk.plugin.server.server_plugin
documentation: VDK Server plugin script.
Copyright 2023-2024 Broadcom
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

modules.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer
documentation: Copyright 2023-2024 Broadcom
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

classes.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.install
documentation: Installs all necessary components and configurations.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.uninstall
documentation: Uninstalls all components.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__docker_container_exists
documentation: Searches for a Docker container with a specified name.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__create_docker_registry_container
documentation:
Creates a Docker registry container with name specified by docker_registry_container_name,
unless a container with this name already exists.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__delete_container
documentation: Deletes the Docker registry container with the specified name.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__restart_container
documentation: Restarts the container with the specified name.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__create_git_server_container
documentation:
Creates a Git server container with name specified by git_server_container_name,
unless a container with this name already exists.

Returns true if the container did not exist and was created successfully; otherwise, false.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__connect_container_to_kind_network
documentation:
Connects a Docker container to the Kind cluster network.
If the container is already connected, an info message is logged.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__resolve_container_ip
documentation:
Returns the IP of the Docker container with the specified name, registered within the 'kind' network.
The IP is obtained by inspecting the configuration of the 'kind' network.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__configure_git_server_with_error_handling
documentation:
Configures the Git server at localhost:10080 with the configurations
specified by the git_server_* variables.

The attempt may fail if the Git server is not yet running (even though the container was created)
with 'Connection reset by peer' error. In this case, the request will be retried with a back-off
several times before failing.

The request may fail even if the installation was successful. This happens due to automatic redirect
to /user/login after installation, which fails and in turn causes the entire request to fail.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__configure_git_server
documentation:
Configures the Git server at localhost:10080 with the configurations
specified by the git_server_* variables.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__create_git_repository
documentation: Creates a new repository in the Git server at localhost:10080.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__create_kind_cluster
documentation: Creates a kind cluster with the private Docker registry enabled in containerd.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__delete_kind_cluster
documentation: Deletes the kind cluster.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__get_kind_cluster
documentation: Checks whether the kind cluster exists.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__configure_kind_local_docker_registry
documentation:
Documents the local registry.

See: https://github.com/kubernetes/enhancements/tree/master/keps/sig-cluster-lifecycle/generic/1755-communicating-a-local-registry

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__install_helm_chart
documentation: Install the VDK Control Service's Helm Chart with all necessary configurations.

methods.name: vdk.plugin.server.installer.Installer.__install_ingress_prerequisites
documentation:
Configure an Nginx-ingress controller to forward requests from outside the cluster
to the Control Service.

See: https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/docs/user/ingress/#ingress-nginx

Installs the Versatile Data Kit Helm Chart along with a private Docker registry
and a private Git server. Only Kind clusters are supported currently.

Based on this script: https://kind.sigs.k8s.io/docs/user/local-registry/
